description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages named "validate yaml syntax" and "network validation with behave". Add a lint job in the "validate yaml syntax" stage that executes the shell command "bash linter.sh". Add a behave job in the "network validation with behave" stage that runs the shell command "bash .behave.sh". Use the default GitLab Runner image and no additional services, caches, artifacts, or rules.
